overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's downtown district at night. The character traverses narrow alleys between corporate towers, open plazas with holographic advertisements, and neon-lit streets with light traffic and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between high-rise buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow alleyway between tall buildings, passing vending machines and parked vehicles

entered.detail: illuminated red and yellow vending machine on the left sidewalk
dark colored sport utility vehicle parked in the alley
tall skyscraper with illuminated windows visible at the end of the alley
massive concrete building wall with vertical window strips

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed alley between towering corporate buildings. A red vending machine stands on the left while parked vehicles occupy the center. The alley opens ahead toward a distant glass skyscraper, with artificial lighting casting dramatic shadows on the concrete walls.

events.description: exits narrow alley into open plaza with holographic displays and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking across the plaza toward a large holographic advertisement display in the center

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking near the holographic display

entered.detail: large floating holographic display showing a rotating human figure
elevated walkway connecting buildings above the plaza

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley, the scene opens into a wide plaza filled with holographic advertisements. A massive floating holographic statue dominates the center while an overhead pedestrian bridge spans the area. Palm trees are visible in the distance as the character walks across the tiled plaza surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with palm tree median and traffic

events.description: descends stairs to street level, entering area with vehicle traffic
futuristic sedan drives past on the wet street

agents.ego_description: descending to street level and walking across the open area toward the main road with light traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the wet asphalt street

entered.detail: multi-lane street with wet asphalt reflecting neon lights
tall pole with illuminated traffic signals
elevated highway structure casting shadows ahead

segments.scene_description: The character descends to street level, entering a multi-lane road with palm tree planters. Wet asphalt reflects the neon lights from surrounding buildings. A futuristic car drives past on the right as the character approaches an overpass structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street under overpass with cleaning facility and neon storefronts

events.description: automated street cleaning vehicle emerges from under the overpass
enters darker alley section with red neon lighting before returning to main street

agents.ego_description: walking along the street, passing under an overpass and a cleaning vehicle, then continuing past neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: large orange and white automated street cleaning vehicle with rotating brushes exiting the underpass
person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with orange arrows and NC CLEANING text
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags
building entrance with green neon geometric lighting patterns
black and orange striped bollards near building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the street passing under a massive concrete overpass. An automated NC CLEANING vehicle emerges from the underpass, driving past the character. The scene briefly shifts to a darker alley with red neon lighting before returning to the main street lined with graffiti-covered walls and neon-lit storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic corporate alleyway into the expansive, neon-drenched streets of a futuristic downtown district. It begins by tracking the character through a narrow corridor between towering buildings, passing a red vending machine and parked cars toward a distant glass skyscraper. As the character emerges from the alley, the space opens into a wide, tiled plaza dominated by a massive floating holographic statue and an overhead pedestrian bridge. The scene then shifts as the character descends to street level, where wet asphalt reflects vibrant neon lights and a futuristic car glides past among palm tree planters. Finally, the camera moves under a massive concrete overpass, passing an automated cleaning vehicle before drifting through a dark, red-lit alley and returning to a main street lined with graffiti and glowing storefronts.
